title: Decision log viewer for Electron desktop app
intent: Add a decision log viewer panel to the desktop app that reads decisions.jsonl via IPC and displays entries with filtering. This closes the last UI gap — operators can inspect governance decisions without the CLI.
acceptance_criteria: New IPC handler kernel:decisions:list reads decisions.jsonl via StateIO + readLog()
DecisionLogView component renders in the detail panel when the Decisions nav tab is selected
Entries display: timestamp, decision outcome (Permit/Deny), capability type, agent ID
Filter controls for outcome and agent ID
Entry click/expand shows full detail: triggered rules, RS hash, input hash
Empty state when no log entries exist
